title: Baptism spoken word formula connections to Isaiah
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - Isaiah 42:1 LEB **Look! here is my servant**; I hold him,  **my chosen one, in whom my soul delights**.  I have put my spirit on him;  he will bring justice forth to the nations. - Isaiah 43:1 LEB B
body:
- Isaiah 42:1 LEB **Look! here is my servant**; I hold him,  **my chosen one, in whom my soul delights**.  I have put my spirit on him;  he will bring justice forth to the nations.
- Isaiah 43:1 LEB But now thus says Yahweh,  he who created you, Jacob,  and he who formed you, Israel:  “You must not fear, for I have redeemed you.  I have called you by your name; **you are mine**._Literally “to me you”_
- Isaiah 43:4 LEB Because you are **precious in my eyes,  you are honored, and I myself love you,**  and I give people in place of you,  and nations in place of your life.
- Isaiah 44:1 LEB “But now hear, **Jacob my servant, ** and Israel, **whom I have chosen**. Isaiah 44:2 LEB Thus says Yahweh, who made you,  and who formed you in the womb and will help you:  you must not fear, my servant Jacob,  and Jeshurun whom I have chosen.
- Isaiah 49:3 LEB And he said to me, “You are my servant,  Israel, in whom I will show my glory.”
content:
- Isaiah 42:1 LEB **Look! here is my servant**; I hold him,  **my chosen one, in whom my soul delights**.  I have put my spirit on him;  he will bring justice forth to the nations.
- Isaiah 43:1 LEB But now thus says Yahweh,  he who created you, Jacob,  and he who formed you, Israel:  “You must not fear, for I have redeemed you.  I have called you by your name; **you are mine**._Literally “to me you”_
- Isaiah 43:4 LEB Because you are **precious in my eyes,  you are honored, and I myself love you,**  and I give people in place of you,  and nations in place of your life.
- Isaiah 44:1 LEB “But now hear, **Jacob my servant, ** and Israel, **whom I have chosen**. Isaiah 44:2 LEB Thus says Yahweh, who made you,  and who formed you in the womb and will help you:  you must not fear, my servant Jacob,  and Jeshurun whom I have chosen.
- Isaiah 49:3 LEB And he said to me, “You are my servant,  Israel, in whom I will show my glory.”
